summary_text: 1. **`execute` semantics are inconsistent by generator mode (production operator confusion risk).** `xauto-draft-only.sh` only adds `--write-notion` in `external` mode; in `registry-local`, `execute` runs the same code path as `smoke` (no write side effect), but still emits normal success output. In production this can look like execution succeeded while nothing was actually promoted/synced. Refs: [xauto-draft-only.sh#L173](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L173), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L177](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L177), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L205](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L205) Missing coverage: no registry-local `--mode execute` behavior test; current registry-local test is smoke-only ([test-xauto-draft-only.sh#L87](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-xauto-draft-only.sh#L87)). 2. **Downstream misuse hazard remains: mixed `created` array contains non-promotable rows.** Generator writes all candidates to `created` (accepted + blocked/rejected). It also exposes safer `accepted`/`promotable`, but adapter persists raw result without enforcing accepted-only projection. Any downstream consumer using `created` can accidentally treat blocked rows as usable. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L604](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L604), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L669](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L669), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L674](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L674), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L210](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L210) Missing coverage: no test asserting downstream must consume only `promotable`/`accepted`; tests only assert shape/counts ([test-xauto-draft-only.sh#L95](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-xauto-draft-only.sh#L95)). 3. **Primary-source eligibility can be incorrectly promoted from metadata truthiness.** Eligibility is set to `eligible` when `primary_source_url(record)` is non-empty, but that function does not enforce non-X canonical URL validity. If metadata carries an X URL or malformed string, row can be marked eligible and promotable incorrectly. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L248](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L248), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L566](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L566), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L570](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L570) Missing coverage: no negative test where metadata `primary_source_url` is X-domain or invalid-but-nonempty. 4. **Live extraction path bypasses sync postprocessing (normalization/recovery drift).** Generator directly calls `analyze_with_xai`/`heuristic_extract` in live mode and returns immediately; it does not call sync helper `postprocess_records`, which is where topic/pattern normalization and deeper primary-source enrichment are consolidated. This degrades acceptance/promotion consistency vs sync pipeline behavior. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L88](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L88), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L99](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L99), [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L423](/Users/masayuki/Dev/f...
